entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A rainfed dryland crop often encountering terminal drought.

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought occurring at the end of the crop season that affects yield and nutrient density.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the grain hybrids were grown.

entities.name: D2 DWARFING GENE
entities.description: A gene that affects plant height and reduces grain iron and zinc density.

entities.name: GRAIN IRON DENSITY
entities.description: The concentration of iron (Fe) in the grains of pearl millet.

entities.name: GRAIN ZINC DENSITY
entities.description: The concentration of zinc (Zn) in the grains of pearl millet.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of grain produced per unit area.

entities.name: ISOGENIC LINES
entities.description: Lines developed from diverse composites used to evaluate the effects of specific genes and conditions.

entities.name: IRRIGATED CONTROL
entities.description: A controlled environment with irrigation used as a baseline for comparison with drought.
